    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    B

    BACKGROUND - Static variable in class util.AppColors
    Main window and screen background — near-black.
    BaseScreen - Class in ui
    Abstract base class for all application screens.
    BaseScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.BaseScreen
    Constructs the screen, stores the app reference, and calls BaseScreen.initComponents() followed by BaseScreen.initLayout().
    BG_COLORS - Static variable in class util.CategoryPillRenderer
    Background colours cycled by category index.
    BudgetCycle - Class in domain
    Represents a user-defined budget cycle with a fixed allowance and date range.
    BudgetCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Constructor for class domain.BudgetCycle
    Creates a new BudgetCycle with status CycleStatus.UNINITIALIZED.
    budgetPieDataset - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Mutable dataset backing the pie chart; updated on every refresh.
    budgetStatusLabel - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Label displaying the overall budget status text.
    buildCategoriesPanel() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Builds the Categories sub-panel with a list of existing categories and controls to add or delete them.
    buildCyclePanel() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Builds the Cycle sub-panel with a reset cycle button.
    buildDatePanel(JSpinner, JSpinner, JSpinner) - Method in class ui.SetupScreen
    Builds a compact inline date panel with day / month / year spinners separated by slash labels.
    buildSecurityPanel() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Builds the Security sub-panel with PIN enable toggle and change PIN row.
    buildSettingsRow(String, String, JComponent) - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Builds a single settings row with a title, subtitle, and an action component.
    buildSubNavBtn(String) - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Creates a styled secondary nav button.
